---
title: "Font Awesome Icons"
filters:
  - diagrams
  - fontawesome
---

Diagram labels are rendered as HTML, so any inline markup you put in an `.item`
carries through into the shape — including icons from the
[Font Awesome](https://github.com/quarto-ext/fontawesome) Quarto extension.

This lets you label a shape with an icon alone — pair it with an
[annotation](annotations.qmd) when you still want a written description.

## Setup

Install the Font Awesome extension alongside `diagrams`:

```bash
quarto add quarto-ext/fontawesome
```

Then activate both filters. You can do this for a single document in the YAML
header:

```yaml
---
filters:
  - diagrams
  - fontawesome
---
```

Insert icons with the `{{{< fa >}}}` shortcode anywhere inside an `.item`.

## Basic usage

Put a single `{{{< fa >}}}` shortcode inside each `.item`. The icon inherits the
node's text color and scales with the shape.

````markdown
::: process
::: item
{{{< fa lightbulb >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa hammer >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa flask >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa rocket >}}}
:::
:::
````

::: process
::: item
{{< fa lightbulb >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa hammer >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa flask >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa rocket >}}
:::
:::

## Any layout

Icons work as labels in every layout.

````markdown
::: {.circle-flow node-color="#4a7ba6"}
::: item
{{{< fa users >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa gears >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa chart-line >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa trophy >}}}
:::
:::
````

::: {.circle-flow node-color="#4a7ba6"}
::: item
{{< fa users >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa gears >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa chart-line >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa trophy >}}
:::
:::

## Brand icons

Font Awesome's brand glyphs work too — use `group=brands`. Pie slices are
roomy, so bump the icons up with `size=4x`.

````markdown
::: {.pie center="Stack"}
::: item
{{{< fa brands html5 size=4x >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa brands css3 size=4x >}}}
:::
::: item
{{{< fa brands js size=4x >}}}
:::
:::
````

::: {.pie center="Stack"}
::: item
{{< fa brands html5 size=4x >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa brands css3 size=4x >}}
:::
::: item
{{< fa brands js size=4x >}}
:::
:::

## Notes

- **Color** — icons inherit the label color, so they pick up the node text
  color automatically. To tint an icon independently, pass the shortcode's own
  options, e.g. `{{{< fa heart title="love" >}}}`.
- **Sizing** — icons are sized relative to the label font and scale with the
  shape. You can override per-icon with the shortcode's `size` option, e.g.
  `{{{< fa rocket size=4x >}}}`.
- **Works everywhere** — icons are supported in every layout's labels and in
  [annotation](annotations.qmd) bodies, since both are rendered as HTML.
